sp_widget.description: IDP Catalog Page widget — displays capability-filtered catalog items grouped by taxonomy. Used on idp_catalog, idp_pipelines, idp_risk_dashboard, idp_approvals, and idp_api_explorer pages. Page title and description configurable via widget instance options.
sp_widget.name: IDP Catalog Page
sp_widget.template:
{{c.pageTitle}}

{{c.pageDesc}}

{{groupName}}

{{item.name}}
{{item.short_description}}
{{item.lifecycle_stage}} {{item.tags}}

No services available for your current capabilities.

Contact your Platform Administrator to request access.
